brand_pillars: Japanese craftsmanship, professional-grade performance, emotional connection to music, premium build quality

markets.visual_culture: Japanese minimalist aesthetic, soft diffused natural light, muted earth tones and cool greys, generous negative space, refined textures such as dark lacquer, washi paper, and polished wood, understated elegance, no clutter

markets.tone: Precision, engineering excellence, serious. Shorter phrasing due to compound words.
markets.visual_culture: Germanic precision aesthetic, clean architectural lines, cool neutral tones of steel and concrete, sharp controlled lighting with hard shadows, structured industrial minimalism, Bauhaus-inspired composition, technical clarity

Brazilian visual energy, warm saturated tropical light, vibrant golden and amber tones, lush organic textures, expressive dynamic composition, rich contrast between deep shadows and glowing highlights, emotional warmth and vitality

copy_constraints.note: German copy may need shorter phrasing due to compound words. Japanese taglines should be concise — 6 short words or fewer.

products.audience: Music students, jazz musicians, urban creatives, age 18-35
products.psychographics: Expressive, passionate about performance, live gigs and festivals
products.scene: Intimate jazz club, warm golden lighting, haze and smoke, spotlit performer area
products.visual_motifs: Stage lights, velvet curtains, close-up brass or chrome reflections, bokeh

products.audience: Professional pianists, conservatory students, high-end home buyers, age 25-55
products.psychographics: Refined taste, values heritage and legacy, seeks instruments that last a lifetime
products.scene: Grand performance hall, marble floors, wood panelling, natural daylight through tall windows
products.visual_motifs: Soft shadows, slow light movement, close-up keys and craftsmanship detail, architectural depth

products.audience: Home musicians, music teachers, families, age 30-60
products.psychographics: Warmth, tradition, music as part of daily family life
products.scene: Warm living room or music studio, soft evening light, timeless domestic setting
products.visual_motifs: Warm wood tones, soft lamp light, sheet music, quiet elegance

products.audience: Producers, bedroom musicians, gigging pianists, age 18-40
products.psychographics: Tech-forward, values versatility, creates music anywhere
products.scene: Sleek modern studio, dark background, subtle LED accent lighting, clean and minimal
products.visual_motifs: Dark studio environment, accent glow, crisp product silhouette, tech aesthetic

products.audience: Rock and blues guitarists, working musicians, collectors, age 20-45
products.psychographics: Serious about tone, values build quality, performs live regularly
products.scene: Industrial warehouse, concrete walls, neon accent lights, amplifier stacks in background
products.visual_motifs: High contrast lighting, dark shadows, neon glow, concrete texture, guitar amps
